purpose: Own pure demo graph lifecycle helpers and shared work graph metadata contracts.
invariants: Feature helpers take explicit inputs instead of importing demo main state.
Graph construction, render calls, and hot render-loop behavior remain in demo/src/main.ts.
DOM IDs are not looked up from this feature.
Work graph metadata should be copied structurally without mutating source data.
change_protocols: When adding work metadata fields, update work-graph-types.ts and attachWorkMetadata together.
When changing generated work graph topology, keep construction in work-graph-generator.ts and placement in work-graph-layout.ts.
When moving lifecycle code out of main.ts, keep Graph instance ownership in main.ts.
